name: codex-ssh-bridge
description: Operate SSH aliases from the local OpenSSH configuration through a native bridge without installing or authenticating Codex remotely.

interface.shortDescription: Operate local SSH aliases from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Keeps Codex, SSH credentials, and approvals on the local machine while a native Rust MCP server exposes bounded remote file and command tools.
defaultPrompt: Use Remote SSH Ops to inspect my SSH alias devbox.
Run the tests on my SSH alias and explain failures.
